SELECT toUInt128(value) FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN ('NaN', 'Inf', '-Inf') FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT toUInt128(value) AS converted FROM test_table WHERE CONVERT(value, 'Float64') > 0 FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT toUInt128(value) AS converted, value FROM (SELECT '128.8' AS value UNION ALL SELECT '256.1') FORMAT Vertical;
WITH (SELECT '128' AS num_str) AS subquery SELECT toUInt128(num_str) FROM subquery FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT toUInt128(ROUND(value, 0)) FROM (SELECT CAST('128.8' AS Float32) AS value) FORMAT Horizontal;
SELECT toUInt128(SUM(value)) FROM (SELECT toUInt128(value) AS value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN ('NaN', 'Inf', '-Inf')) FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT DISTINCT toUInt128(number) AS uint_value FROM (SELECT number FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([128, 128.1, '256', '-512', '-1.3']) AS number)) FORMAT Vertical;
WITH (SELECT CAST(value AS Int8) FROM test_table) AS subquery SELECT toUInt128(value) FROM subquery WHERE value IS NOT NULL FORMAT Vertical;
